other_observers: Observed with Cheryl Touten, Dan Brooks, "Sully" Sullivan. David Gillian + one other saw the bird just before I arrived, David Waltman after I left
specific_location: Beech Open Space east of US 36 and south of Neva Rd.
description: I observed a western meadowlark chasing a second meadowlark that showed much more white in its tail. That was the only visual I had of the bird.Behavior: singing from a perchCall: Singing "spring of the year"-type song 4 to 6 times in one short period.Plumage: adult
